overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Batman video game showing the character gliding through a stormy industrial dockyard at night. The scene features neon signage, industrial cranes, and a lighthouse, with the player navigating using a grappling hook boost.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial dockyard with shipping containers and cranes

agents.ego_description: Batman gliding high above the industrial docks with cape fully extended, descending toward the metal structures below

entered.detail: Large industrial sign mounted on a building facade ahead
Illuminated screen displaying news broadcast with blue and red graphics
Tall metal crane structures silhouetted against the stormy sky
Rusty metal walkways and platforms of the dockyard below

segments.scene_description: Batman glides high above a dark industrial dockyard, with the 'PANEASA STUDIOS' sign and a large digital billboard visible ahead. The camera follows from behind as he descends toward the metal walkways and cranes below.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor between industrial dock buildings

events.description: descends to low altitude navigation between tight industrial structures

agents.ego_description: navigating through tight industrial corridors at low altitude, weaving between metal walkways and neon signage

entered.detail: Circular red neon sign with 'FERRIS AIR' lettering glowing brightly
Large beached ship hull with rusted metal surfaces and broken superstructure

segments.scene_description: Descending to street level between the industrial structures, Batman glides past the red neon 'FERRIS AIR' sign. The large shipwreck structure becomes visible ahead as he navigates through the metal walkways of the dockyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open air above harbor with lighthouse and full moon

events.description: fires grappling hook to rapidly ascend and gain altitude above the docks
camera tilts upward revealing bright full moon and stormy night sky

agents.ego_description: using grappling hook to boost upward then gliding toward the lighthouse tower silhouetted against the moon

entered.detail: Tall cylindrical tower with lantern room on top, silhouetted against the moon
Bright full moon partially obscured by storm clouds

segments.scene_description: Batman fires his grappling hook to launch upward, revealing a dramatic stormy sky with a bright full moon. He then glides toward the lighthouse tower on the waterfront, with the shipwreck structure now visible to the left below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high aerial view of a dark industrial dockyard into a dramatic ascent toward a coastal lighthouse. It begins high above the city, tracking Batman as he glides toward the glowing PANEASA STUDIOS sign and a large digital billboard. As he descends toward street level, the camera weaves through metal walkways and industrial cranes, passing under the red neon glow of a FERRIS AIR sign while a massive shipwreck comes into view. The scene then shifts abruptly as Batman fires his grappling hook to launch upward, breaking through the industrial clutter to reveal a stormy sky dominated by a bright full moon. Finally, the camera glides toward the towering lighthouse on the waterfront, leaving the shipwreck and the dockyard structures behind below.
